com.testingtech.tworkbench.ttman.server.api

Class Credentials

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.testingtech.tworkbench.ttman.server.api.Credentials

  • public class Credentials
extends java.lang.Object
    Container for user credentials: login and password. The password should be encrypted.
    Since:
    TTworkbench 15

    • Constructor Summary

      Constructors 
      Constructor and Description
      Credentials(java.lang.String login, byte[] password)
      Create a new user credentials with login and binary password
      Credentials(java.lang.String login, java.lang.String password)
      Create a new user credentials.

    • Method Summary

      All Methods Instance Methods Concrete Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      java.lang.String getLogin()
      Get the user login
      byte[] getPassword()
      Get the user password bytes
      void setLogin(java.lang.String login)
      Set the user login
      void setPassword(byte[] password)
      Set the user password from bytes
      void setPassword(java.lang.String password)
      Set the user password to UTF-8 bytes from string

      • Methods inherited from class java.lang.Object

        clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

    • Constructor Detail

      • Credentials

        public Credentials(java.lang.String login,
                   byte[] password)
        Create a new user credentials with login and binary password
        Parameters:
        login - the user login
        password - user password will be stored as binary.

      • Credentials

        public Credentials(java.lang.String login,
                   java.lang.String password)
        Create a new user credentials.
        Parameters:
        login - the user login
        password - user password will be stored as binary using String.getBytes(Charset) and UTF-8 encoding.

    • Method Detail

      • getLogin

        public java.lang.String getLogin()
        Get the user login
        Returns:
        login the user login

      • setLogin

        public void setLogin(java.lang.String login)
        Set the user login
        Parameters:
        login - the user login

      • getPassword

        public byte[] getPassword()
        Get the user password bytes
        Returns:
        password the binary user password

      • setPassword

        public void setPassword(byte[] password)
        Set the user password from bytes
        Parameters:
        password - user password will be stored as binary

      • setPassword

        public void setPassword(java.lang.String password)
        Set the user password to UTF-8 bytes from string
        Parameters:
        password - user password will be stored as binary using String.getBytes(Charset) and UTF-8 encoding.
